pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly enforce the bookmark identifier 'Logistics View'.
Verified against Magento 2 open source sales_order_grid.xml where 'Payment Method' label maps to 'payment_method' and 'Shipping Information' maps to 'shipping_information'.
Verified against Magento 2 open source sales_order_grid.xml where 'Grand Total (Base)' label maps to 'base_grand_total'.

privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to create a synthetic view configuration in Magento Admin. The target view name 'Logistics View' exactly matches the task description instructions. The internal Magento column names for 'Payment Method', 'Shipping Information', and 'Grand Total (Base)' were independently verified via Magento source code (sales_order_grid.xml) to be 'payment_method', 'shipping_information', and 'base_grand_total' respectively.
